title: Helm built-in objects and .Capabilities gating
description: Explains the built-in objects (.Release, .Chart, .Files, .Capabilities) and using .Capabilities.APIVersions to render version-appropriate manifests.
body: Use when a chart must adapt to the cluster or read packaged files. Do not hardcode an apiVersion that may not exist on the target cluster. Actions: use .Release for name/namespace/revision, .Chart for chart metadata, .Files.Get to embed packaged files, and .Capabilities.APIVersions.Has to gate a manifest on whether the cluster supports an API. Inspect with helm template --debug. Validation signals include the chart rendering the correct apiVersion for the target's Capabilities and embedded files appearing in the output. Risk boundary: none for rendering; mismatched capabilities just produce inapplicable manifests caught at apply.
